title: Smoke Rice Noodles
description: Sweet and flaky rice noodles infused with smoky flavors for a romantic Italian-inspired dish that's also fodmap-friendly.

ingredients.name: 6 cups water for soaking rice noodles

instructions: In a pot, combine rice and salt. Bring to boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat to low and simmer until all liquid is absorbed (about 20 minutes).
Strain cooked rice and set aside.
Heat water for soaking noodles in the microwave or on the stove until just boiling (should take about 5-10 minutes).
Place soaked rice noodles into a large mixing bowl. Slowly add warm water to noodle mixture, stirring continuously, until fully hydrated (about 3 minutes).
Add lemon juice and minced garlic to noodles, mix well.
Fold in smoked paprika flakes gently by hand or use a wooden spoon to avoid breaking the delicate noodles.
Transfer seasoned rice noodles onto serving plates. Serve hot with optional toppings like sliced avocado, fresh herbs, or a drizzle of olive oil.
